testcase.name: @BeforeMethod ConfigureAppium
testcase.failure: java.lang.RuntimeException: Driver setup failed at TestBase.BaseClass.ConfigureAppium(BaseClass.java:109) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) Caused by: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session.
